chunks.text: In my town, there is a beautiful park that everyone loves.
In the park, there are many tall trees.
When the wind blows, the leaves move gently.
Near the wide grass, there is a small pond.
There are birds and fish living quietly.
Under a big tree, there is an old rock.
Children often sit on it to rest.
On a sunny summer day, there are many children playing on the grass.
“ Is there a river in the park?
“ Yes, there is a thin one,” I answered.
Last year, there was a lot of snow here
but now there is no snow at all.
